market_pulse: Strong competitive activity across all major venues with heavy EDC Week recovery momentum; LIV Beach leading with David Guetta and consistent high-engagement posts, while XS, Encore, and OMNIA pushing talent lineups mid-month.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: Heavy talent announcements across competing venues
Zouk pushing Bolota Loaner and RLGrime for Fri/Sat
LIV Beach momentum carrying post-EDC energy
Encore Beach featuring multiple major DJs through weekend
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Capitalize on post-EDC buzz; LIV Beach has strong content velocity. Counter-program weeknight with exclusive talent or extended hours promos to capture crossover traffic from competitors. Monitor Hakkasan R&B Wednesday strategy.

content_gaps.description: Competitors heavily leveraging bass/dubstep remix content; minimal behind-the-scenes booth energy from LIV despite strong lineups
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create booth POV content featuring David Guetta/upcoming talent at LIV; emphasize production quality and artist energy during sets

content_gaps.description: Competitors seeing high UGC engagement from attendees; LIV has strong official posts but lower repost/feature ratio
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase UGC reposting; create specific hashtag campaigns for weekend events with incentive features

content_gaps.description: Zouk and OMNIA using 48-72 hour countdown content with urgency triggers; LIV using event calendar but missing drama element
content_gaps.suggested_action: Test countdown-to-talent posts on Stories with time-bound promo codes; limit-availability angles drive bookings
